title: Soil structure type
description: Primary ped shapes used in soil description.

title: Granular
description: Rounded aggregates; common in A horizons
source: Agrégats arrondis; fréquents dans l’horizon A

title: Blocky
description: Angular or subangular blocks; common in B horizons
source: Blocs anguleux ou subanguleux; fréquents dans l’horizon B

title: Platy
description: Horizontal plates; may impede vertical flow
source: Plaques horizontales; peut freiner l’écoulement vertical

title: Columnar
description: Vertical columns with rounded tops; often sodic
source: Colonnes verticales à sommet arrondi; souvent sodiques
